description: Calculate the flooring material quantities and total costs for the home renovation project, accounting for irregular room shapes, waste factors, and box quantity rounding. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/flooring_estimate.csv.

natural_language.prompt: Create a flooring estimate calculator for three rooms (living room, bedroom, hallway) that calculates adjusted square footage with waste factors, number of boxes needed (rounded up), and total costs for flooring and underlayment.
